The '''Citadel garrison''' was the contingent of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|Warriors]] who were tasked with defending the [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra's]] [[Shimrra's Citadel|Citadel]]. During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], Shimrra placed them at the right hand of [[Nom Anor]], the new [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] of [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], with orders to wipe out every [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] on on the Vongformed capital.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
